task_completion.description: Create a new style named 'graduated_pop' in the 'ne' workspace
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the GeoServer 'New Style' or 'Edit Style' page. The 'Name' text field should contain 'graduated_pop' and the 'Workspace' dropdown should have 'ne' selected.

task_completion.description: Define the style with orange fill and black stroke
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for SLD XML code in the style editor text area containing `<CssParameter name="fill">#ff9900</CssParameter>` and `<CssParameter name="stroke">#000000</CssParameter>` (or equivalent SVG parameter tags) within a PointSymbolizer block.

task_completion.description: Define the dynamic size formula using the 'pop_max' attribute
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for SLD XML code in the style editor containing a `<Size>` element. Inside it, there should be OGC math expressions (like `<ogc:Add>` and `<ogc:Div>`) combining the literal `6`, the property name `pop_max`, and the literal `1000000`.
Look for the GeoServer 'Edit Layer' page with the title or layer name showing 'ne_populated_places'.

task_completion.description: Set 'graduated_pop' as the default style for the layer
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Publishing' tab on the 'Edit Layer' page. The 'Default Style' dropdown must have 'graduated_pop' (or 'ne:graduated_pop') selected.

integrity.description: Agent used the GeoServer web interface to configure the style and layer
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the agent interacts with the GeoServer web administration interface in a browser, rather than using terminal commands (like curl or REST API) to configure the server.

integrity.description: Agent entered the SLD code into the GeoServer style editor
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the SLD XML is entered directly into the GeoServer style editor text area in the browser, not just written in a standalone text editor without uploading.

integrity.description: Agent saved the style and layer configurations
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the agent actually saves the style and layer settings by clicking the 'Save' or 'Submit' buttons at the bottom of the pages.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target style name: 'graduated_pop'. Target workspace: 'ne'. Target layer: 'ne_populated_places'. Size formula: 6 + (pop_max / 1000000). Fill color: '#ff9900'. Stroke color: '#000000'. The 'pop_max' attribute contains real population values.
